enum Processor {
    Doubling,
    Clamping,
}

impl Processor {
    fn process(&self, value: f64) -> f64 {
        // GOOD: enum dispatch — static dispatch, no pointer chasing
        match self {
            Processor::Doubling => value * 2.0,
            Processor::Clamping => value.clamp(0.0, 100.0),
        }
    }
}

fn apply_pipeline(data: &mut [f64], processors: &[Processor]) {
    for value in data.iter_mut() {
        for proc in processors {
            *value = proc.process(*value);
        }
    }
}
